seed_instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals.
org_constraint: The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email should consist of 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least four sentences.
instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email should consist of 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least four sentences.
response:
Dear Professor Evans, I am writing to formally introduce myself as a prospective student eager to join your distinguished department this fall. My name is Alex Chen, and I have long admired your pioneering work in renewable energy systems published last year. After reviewing several of your recent lectures, I felt compelled to reach out directly to discuss the possibility of attending your advanced seminar series. Your unique perspective on sustainable engineering has genuinely inspired my academic path for the past two years.

My primary goal for entering your program is to develop a specialized thesis on next-generation solar thermal efficiency under your guidance. I aim to combine my background in physics with practical fieldwork to create innovative solutions for rural electrification projects. Furthermore, I hope to collaborate with your team on upcoming research grants focused on reducing carbon footprints in urban infrastructure. These objectives align perfectly with the curriculum you offer and the values your department upholds every single day.

I would be grateful if you could consider my application or simply schedule a brief meeting to discuss how we might connect professionally. Please let me know if there are any specific materials you require from me to facilitate this initial conversation before the semester begins. I look forward to the potential opportunity to contribute meaningfully to your ongoing research initiatives soon. Thank you very much for your time and for considering my request at such an important stage of my life.<|im_end|>
final_answer:
